title: Chief Academic Officer
notes: Bastrop County district (~11,500 students) east of Austin. Eberly joined BISD in 2022 as Director of Teaching and Learning, named CAO in 2024; owns district-wide curriculum and instruction. Strong ECE footprint -- BISD operates three licensed Child Development Centers (Emile, Cedar Creek, Bluebonnet) serving children 6 wks-4 yrs plus PreK at multiple elementary campuses. Dr. Matt Warford serves as Associate Superintendent of C&I; Dr. Kristi Lee is Superintendent. Email confirmed via district news release.

title: Superintendent

No dedicated ECE/curriculum director in public directory -- superintendent is right target. Email inferred from district FLast@bbpbschools.net pattern; phone is main office line.

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent
notes: Tiny unincorporated Hunt County district near Quinlan, originally founded 1985 to serve Boles Children's Home. Goss has served as Superintendent since January 2020. Email and phone confirmed publicly. Domain note: district uses bolesonline.com for staff email, not bolesisd.com (which is the public site). Mailing 9777 FM 2101, Quinlan TX 75474.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Hutchinson County panhandle district (~2,000 students). Blansett owns district-wide C&I including Pre-K (Paul Belton Elementary serves PreK/K with open enrollment for 4-year-olds). Also serves as 504/ADA Coordinator. Email inferred from district FLast@borgerisd.net pattern confirmed by ZoomInfo masking. Secretary Tiffany Haberman supports the office. Address 200 East Ninth, Borger, TX 79007.

title: Superintendent
notes: Oldham County district serving Cal Farley's Boys Ranch (residential program for at-risk youth, founded 1939). Three schools: Mimi Farley Elementary, Blakemore Middle, Boys Ranch HS. No taxable base -- relies on donor funding. No dedicated ECE/curriculum director given specialized residential mission -- superintendent is right target. Email inferred from district FLast@boysranchisd.org pattern. PO Box 219, Boys Ranch, TX 79010.

title: Chief Academic Officer
notes: Washington County district (~5,000 students). Borchgardt leads Leading & Learning Department which audits all instructional materials. District operates a dedicated Brenham Early Childhood Learning Center at 304 Kerr St. District completed Literacy Instructional Framework, earned TEA Exemplary rating Jan 2026 -- strong literacy/ECE signal. Email domain confirmed: district uses brenhamk-12.net for staff email, not brenhamisd.net. Jamey Johnson is Asst Supt of C&I. Central office 525 A H Ehrig Dr, Brenham, TX 77833.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction

Strong ECE alignment given background. District uses CIRCLE Progress Monitoring for Pre-K. Email format first.last@burkburnettisd.org confirmed as 100% standard pattern. C&I office direct line ext. 2014.

title: Director of Elementary Curriculum
notes: Hunt County district (~2,800 students). Mosher owns elementary curriculum which includes PreK. Email and phone confirmed via district staff directory. District participates in HB 4 PreK Family Engagement Plan. Strategic Staffing Grant 2024-2026 awarded. Deputy Supt Keri Allen also a strong secondary contact (kallen@caddomillsisd.org). Courtney Painter listed as Director of Elementary C&I on LinkedIn (potential title overlap).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Hunt County district. Email confirmed publicly on district superintendent page. No dedicated ECE/curriculum director -- superintendent is right target. Admin asst Melissa Earle supports the office. Address 480 North Patterson St, Campbell, TX.

notes: Large Dallas/Denton County district (~24,000 students) -- key target. Meyer directly owns Early Learning programs including Pre-K. Email confirmed via district pages. title: Interim Superintendent / Assistant Superintendent
notes: Rural Leon County district (~700 students K-12). LEADERSHIP IN TRANSITION: Sullivan appointed interim superintendent Oct 2025 after Supt Carole Dickey was placed on administrative leave following indictment; Dickey's trial scheduled Aug 2026. Sullivan also serves as Title IX Coordinator. Use Sullivan as primary contact. Domain note: staff use centerville.k12.tx.us (the centervilleisd.net redirect appears to be alt URL). Email inferred from FLast pattern; Carole Dickey's email cdickey@centerville.k12.tx.us confirms format. Address 813 South Commerce, Centerville, TX 75833.

title: Superintendent

title: Assistant Superintendent of Teaching and Learning

District follows Texas Pre-K Guidelines for early learning curriculum. Karen Hearn is ELA Coordinator K-5 (khearn1@ccisd.net) -- secondary contact for literacy/ECE. Supt is Dr. Karen Engle. Email inferred from FLast@ccisd.net pattern.

title: Principal, Amber Terrace Early Childhood Learning Center (prior Director of Early Childhood)
notes: Dallas County district (~6,500 students) -- strong fit. Coleman served as district-wide Director of Early Childhood 2020-2023 (led HB3 Reading Academy implementation, instructional coaching, library services), now Principal of Amber Terrace ECE Learning Center; named 2024-25 DeSoto Principal of the Year. She remains the operational ECE owner at the district -- highest expertise contact. District offers Full-Day PreK3, PreK4 and Kindergarten at Amber Terrace (224 Amber Lane). Chief Academic Officer office uses Tia Jackson as exec asst. Email format first.last@desotoisd.org confirmed.
